notes: Additive CSS primitives under _BROKER_CSS. No _BASE_CSS_VERSION bump. Live-confirmation subscreen loads its warning body from /api/broker/live-warning at render time. Saved-connections table always visible below the wizard steps.
review_criteria: Frontend wires the five-step DOM + JS state machine using F005 withStates() for the test-connection in-flight state
Password field: type=password + autocomplete=off + no default value
Server input backed by a <datalist> whose options are strictly from ALLOWED_SERVERS
Live-confirmation Continue button starts disabled and unlocks only under both gates
